ast.name: textContent
confirm
ast.source: This note has unsaved changes. Close it and discard those changes?
ast.target: 此笔记有未保存的更改。关闭并丢弃这些更改？

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: This note has unsaved changes. Switch notes and discard those changes?
ast.target: 此笔记有未保存的更改。切换笔记并丢弃这些更改？

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: This note has unsaved changes. Delete the file and discard those changes?
ast.target: 此笔记有未保存的更改。删除文件并丢弃这些更改？

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: You have unsaved changes. Quit Obsidian and discard those changes?
ast.target: 您有未保存的更改。退出Obsidian并丢弃这些更改？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only save when you trigger Obsidian's Save File command manually.
ast.target: 仅在手动触发 Obsidian 的保存文件命令时保存。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait after editing stops before saving (3-3600).
ast.target: 编辑停止后等待多久再保存（3-3600）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum delay before persisting workspace.json after layout changes (1-3600).
ast.target: 布局更改后，延迟多久再持久化 workspace.json（1-3600）。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 工作区布局保存延迟（秒）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Status dot color when all changes are saved.
ast.target: 所有更改均已保存时的状态点颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Status dot color while a delayed save is waiting.
ast.target: 延迟保存等待期间的状态点颜色。
